atus.title: Add and List commands
atus.description: Implement 'add' command (append task to file) and 'list' command (display tasks with 1-based ID). Handle empty list (no output) and special characters.

samples.name: todo_sample1.py
samples.strategy: 直接文件 I/O，不使用辅助函数

atus.title: Remove command
atus.description: Implement 'remove' command (delete task by 1-based ID). Handle non-existent ID gracefully (silent ignore, no crash). Re-index remaining tasks after deletion.
